subcodes.first_line: I am the Manifestation of inner meanings. I have accepted thee above all meanings, and bestowed upon thee all meanings in love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا مظهر المعانی قد قبلناک علی جمیع المعانی و اعطیناک جمیع المعانی فی حب
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
